raw_description:
Located on the crescent of the Palm Island in Dubai, next to Atlantis, The Palm and Aquaventure World, Atlantis The Royal offers access to the world’s largest waterpark, 16 restaurants and bars, nightclubs, Skyblaze Fountain show, outdoor swimming pools, beach clubs, a state-of-the-art spa, and free private parking. With free WiFi, this 5-star resort has a sky pool and a private beach, a 24-hour front desk, room service and currency exchange for guests. Selected rooms also feature a kitchen with a mini-bar.

Atlantis The Royal includes Rooms, Suites and Signature Penthouses, featuring views of the Arabian Sea and Palm Island. With private balconies, terraces and private pools.

Continental and buffet breakfast options are available every morning at the resort.

Home to 16 world-class restaurants, including 7 celebrity chef restaurants and 1 Michelin starred restaurant, Atlantis The Royal is a culinary destination in Dubai.

The Walk at JBR is 6.8 mi from the accommodations, Mall of The Emirates is 11 mi from the resort. The nearest airport is Dubai International, 22 mi from Atlantis The Royal, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Atlantis The Royal. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 3 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Beachfront.
